description: Polls an MLflow experiment for new runs and fires a Dagster RunRequest per new run. Cursor-based dedup on run_id.

tracking_uri_env_var.description: Env var holding the MLflow Tracking URI.

experiment_name.description: MLflow experiment name to watch. Provide this OR experiment_id.

experiment_id.description: MLflow experiment ID to watch. Provide this OR experiment_name.

target_job.description: Dagster job to trigger for each new run.

max_new_runs_per_tick.description: Cap on RunRequests per tick (guardrail against burst backfills).

username_env_var.description: Env var for HTTP-basic MLflow auth username (optional).

password_env_var.description: Env var for HTTP-basic MLflow auth password (optional).

run_config.description: Extra run_config merged into the triggered job's config.
